CREATE TABLE series_data (id UInt32, values Array(Float64));
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(values) AS period FROM series_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(values) AS period FROM series_data WHERE id = 3;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(values) AS period FROM series_data WHERE id = 2;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(arrayMap(x -> sin(x), range(0, 1000))) AS period;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(arrayMap(x -> cos(x), range(0, 1000))) AS period;
SELECT id, seriesPeriodDetectFFT(values) AS period FROM series_data HAVING period IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(values) FROM series_data WHERE id = 1) AS expanded_series SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(expanded_series) AS period;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(arrayMap(x -> abs((x % 10) - 5), range(100))) AS period;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(arrayConcat([0, 1, 0, -1], arrayMap(x -> x * 0.5, range(4)))) AS period;
CREATE TABLE sample_series AS SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> x * 3, values) AS scaled_values FROM series_data;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(scaled_values) AS period FROM sample_series WHERE id = 1;
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT((SELECT arrayJoin(values) FROM series_data WHERE id = 1)) AS period;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (timestamp DateTime, value Float64);
INSERT INTO temp_data VALUES (now(), 1.0), (now() + interval 1 minute, 1.0), (now() + interval 2 minute, 1.0), (now() + interval 3 minute, 1.0);
SELECT seriesPeriodDetectFFT(groupArray(value)) AS period FROM temp_data GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(timestamp);
